commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the non-interactive local setup health-failure hint and its regression assertion so unsupported setup flags point at the onboard command.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests 0. Total 0 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows setup forwards non-interactive local setup into the onboard path, while setup does not register the two flags named by the current failure hint.
